project_type: Next.js 16 App Router music discovery web app
build_system: bun (also npm). No special build quirks. Uses Tailwind CSS 4 with @theme inline syntax.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'bun run lint' to ensure zero lint errors. 2. Run 'bun run build' to ensure successful build with zero TypeScript errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No API keys available - only iTunes Search API and Apple RSS API work without keys. Avoid infinite re-render patterns - don't use useSyncExternalStore returning new objects in getSnapshot(), be careful with useEffect dependencies.
contribution_requirements: Zero TypeScript errors, zero lint errors, successful build. Responsive design (desktop, tablet, mobile). Semantic HTML, WCAG 2.2 AA. Lucide React icons. Use design token system from globals.css. No console.log in production.
key_patterns: Server Components by default, Client Components with 'use client' only when needed. Glass hierarchy CSS classes (glass-subtle through glass-ultra). Motion tokens (--duration-micro/standard/complex/page). useSyncExternalStore with stable getSnapshot functions. @/lib/ for services, @/app/components/ for UI. ThemeContext uses cached snapshots pattern.
directory_structure: app/ - App Router pages and components. app/components/ - shared components with subdirs (search/, player/, discover/, album/, favorites/, settings/, ui/). app/api/ - route handlers (lyrics, recommendations, spotify, youtube). lib/ - service modules (itunes, discovery, ai-discovery, recommendations, etc). public/ - static assets. types/ - TypeScript type definitions.
